_publications._publicationTitle: A platform for rapid patient-derived cutaneous neurofibroma organoid establishment and screening

basicInfo.description: Patient-derived cNF organoid from 41-year-old female NF1 patient; established from anterior trunk/bilateral areola/arms cNF by collagenase IV dissociation and reconstitution in Mammocult:Matrigel (3:4) ring format; compound NF1 variants (deletion + large inversion + splicing) identified by WGS
basicInfo.clinicalData: Age at surgery: 41; Sex: Female; cNF location: anterior trunk, bilateral areola, arms; Single tumors: 7; Pooled tumors: 5; NF1 germline variants: deletion chr17 (351 bp, pos 31,332,573-31,332,924); large inversion chr17:2,514,734-40,523,190; splicing variant G>A (pos 31,163,377)
validationMethods: IHC (S100, CD34, CD56, CD117/c-Kit, NGFR, SOX2, SOX10, PanCytokeratin)
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: Department of Orthopaedic Surgery, David Geffen School of Medicine, UCLA
